name: monika-ai-backend
description: Production AI companion with persistent authentication, multi-conversation chat, editable memory, streaming, attachments, reminders, session management, and admin controls

scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check models.js && node --check utils.js && node --check validation.js && node --check ../public/script.js && node --check ../public/admin.js && node --check ../public/sw.js
scripts.test: npm run check && npm run lint && node --test test/*.test.js

author: Arpit Tagade
